message:
🌱 Add opentelemetry-collector: [Documentation] Explain the exporter queue failure scenario mission (#1511)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentelemetry-collector-5952-documentation-explain-the-exporter-queue-failure-sc",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentelemetry-collector: [Documentation] Explain the exporter queue failure scenario",
+    "description": "[Documentation] Explain the exporter queue failure scenario. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentelemetry-collector deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentelemetry-collector version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector\nhelm list -n opentelemetry-collector 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentelemetry-collector installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry-collector configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-collector configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector\nkubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-collector\n```\nNo this is specific to documentation.\n\nAdd a paragraph in [exporter helper](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector/tree/main/exporter/exporterhelper) explaining the failure scenarios:\n- if new items can't be added to the queue for"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Documentation] Explain the exporter queue failure scenario",
+        "description": "Adds documentation clarifying that data is dropped when it cannot be enqueued\n(e.g., queue at capacity or persistent storage cannot accept writes).\n\nThis happens before exporter retry logic.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector\nkubectl get events -n opentelemetry-collector --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[Documentation] Explain the exporter queue failure scenario\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Adds documentation clarifying that data is dropped when it cannot be enqueued\n(e.g., queue at capacity or persistent storage cannot accept writes).\n\nThis happens before exporter retry logic.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentelemetry-collector",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [

+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],

+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",

+    },

+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
